rationale: The cited paper appears only once in the discussion section, as an example citation for viewing products as rewarding versus nonrewarding. The citing article does not use Kivetz and Simonson (2002) to build hypotheses, operationalize variables, design experiments, or test its core mechanism in a direct way. The study is primarily grounded in reverse alliesthesia and general motivation/BAS frameworks, so this reference serves peripheral background support.
